title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin builds a complete harness architecture called the AI Layer for Claude Code to operate effectively in large codebases. The architecture includes CLAUDE.md hierarchies, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and plugins. The core insight is that the engineering harness around the model matters more than the model itself.
